description: Barceló MCP is a ChatGPT application from Barceló Hotel Group that lets users search hotels, check room availability and pricing, view hotel details, and generate booking links. It uses Model Context Protocol over HTTP and authenticates with OAuth 2.1.
summary: barcelo-mcp.com exposes one OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://barcelo-mcp.com/mcp`; no separate public HTTP/GraphQL API or CLI surface was found.
